summary: Performance Insight Banner feature and Top 10 Agents chart fix verified. All 11 backend tests passed. All 5 frontend role-specific scenarios passed via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/dashboard/performance-insight returns type=agent for sales_executive with your_deals, rank, delta_pct
Backend: /api/dashboard/performance-insight returns type=leader for team_leader with team_name=TEAM XLNC, team_deals, team_revenue
Backend: /api/dashboard/performance-insight returns type=admin for super_admin with total_deals, active_agents, avg metrics
Backend: /api/cs/dashboard/performance-insight returns type=agent for cs_agent with your_upgrades field
Backend: /api/cs/dashboard/performance-insight returns type=admin for cs_head with total_upgrades, active_agents
Backend: /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings returns 200 with data for sales_executive (FIX VERIFIED)
Backend: /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings returns 200 with data for team_leader (FIX VERIFIED)
Backend: /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings returns 200 with data for super_admin
Backend: team_leader has non-empty team_name field (TEAM XLNC)
Backend: Month format validated as 'Month YYYY' (March 2026)
Frontend: Sales Agent (Aleesha) - Performance Insight Banner VISIBLE: 'Hey Aleesha, you closed 3 deals worth AED 10,407 in March 2026' with rank 4th of 15
Frontend: Sales Agent (Aleesha) - Top 10 Agents chart SHOWING DATA with 16 bars (was 'No data' before fix)
Frontend: Team Leader (Mohammed) - Performance Insight Banner VISIBLE: 'Mohammed, TEAM XLNC closed 9 deals worth AED 28,112'
Frontend: Team Leader (Mohammed) - Top 10 Agents chart SHOWING DATA
Frontend: CS Agent (Della) - Performance Insight Banner VISIBLE: 'Hey Della, no upgrades closed yet in March 2026 — let's get going!'
Frontend: CS Head (Falja) - Performance Insight Banner VISIBLE: 'March 2026: 13 upgrades closed by 1 agents totalling AED 35,899'
Frontend: Admin (Aqib) - Performance Insight Banner VISIBLE: 'March 2026: 29 deals closed by 15 agents totalling AED 119,655'
Frontend: Banner has data-testid='performance-insight-banner' for all roles

top_10_agents_fix.root_cause: The /api/dashboard/sales-agent-closings endpoint was using require_roles(['super_admin', 'admin', 'sales_manager']) instead of get_current_user, blocking sales_executive and team_leader access
top_10_agents_fix.fix_applied: Changed to Depends(get_current_user) to allow all authenticated users
top_10_agents_fix.verification_result: PASS - Sales agents and team leaders now see Top 10 Agents chart with data

banner_variations.agent: Shows individual deals/upgrades, rank, comparison to team average (delta_pct)
banner_variations.leader: Shows team name, team deals/revenue, agent count, company totals
banner_variations.admin: Shows company-wide totals, active agents, averages

performance_insight_banner.verification_result: PASS - All role-specific banners displaying correctly

critical_code_review_comments: PerformanceInsightBanner component correctly handles all three types: agent, leader, admin
Banner gracefully handles zero activity with motivational message (e.g., Della with 0 upgrades)
data-testid='performance-insight-banner' correctly added to all banner variations
CS dashboard correctly uses 'upgrades' terminology while Sales uses 'deals'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two features verified: 1) Top 10 Agents chart fix - sales-agent-closings endpoint now allows all authenticated users instead of admin-only. 2) New Performance Insight Banner component added to both Sales (/sales/dashboard) and CS (/cs/dashboard) dashboards. The banner shows role-specific metrics: agents see their rank and deals/upgrades vs team average, leaders see team totals, admins see company totals. CS dashboard uses 'upgrades' terminology, Sales uses 'deals'. Banner handles zero activity gracefully with motivational message. Note: CS Head (falja) gets 403 errors for /dashboard/cs-agent-bifurcation which is admin-only - this is expected behavior.
testing_method: Backend pytest (11 tests) + Playwright browser automation for frontend verification
